title: Enchanted Covers
description:
Adds custom textures to enchanted books. 
Works without Optifine/Citresewn!
body:
# Enchanted Covers
Textures by [SmollDave](https://x.com/SmollDave), resourcepack by [StefanJ2_](https://www.curseforge.com/members/stefanj2_/projects)

![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea7f76ee5d77d25927aff558f4d22a9196f0cd63.png)

### Use it in vanilla
Use the resourcepack in vanilla with the [Enchanted Book Enabler Datapack](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/enchantedbookenabler-datapack)
### Use it with mods
Use the resourcepack with mods when using [Optifine](https://optifine.net/) or [Citresewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn/versions)

## What does the pack do?
Enchanted covers changes the textures of books in the game to a beautiful new style and with that also adds custom textures for all enchanted books in the game!

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13547752937eddaa904039acf51eb21d8298ab2a.png)
